---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an extension or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

What problem would this solve, or what would it enable? If it touches a scientific claim, name the
source that motivates it.

## Proposed change

A clear description of what you would like to see.

## Scope and alternatives

How large is the change (a knob, a new experiment, a new geometry)? Any alternatives considered?
Note that this project reports a finding at a stated noise floor; extensions that change the
operating point or the forward operator should say so explicitly.
